title: Syrian Lamb Kebabs
description: Intensely savory Syrian lamb kebabs, salty and fluffy, with a mix of spices and a long braise, featuring jerk seasoning, perfect for a monsoon day, and nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, if using.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the lamb marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the marinade and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the lamb for 20 minutes, then baste with lemon juice and yogurt.
Continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before serving.
